title: marsdenia ovata
intro: Marsdenia ovata, also known as the Australian milk vine, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Marsdenia ovata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual circumstances.
